testcase.name: verify_main_and_drain_bindings_online

failure.message: Timeout waiting for DB condition: SELECT cb.role FROM channel_bindings cb JOIN node_channels nc ON nc.id = cb.node_channel_id JOIN nodes n ON n.id = nc.node_id WHERE n.zone_id = :zone_id AND n.uid = :node_uid AND n.status = 'online' AND cb.role IN ('main_pump', 'drain') ORDER BY cb.role

testcase.failure: Timeout waiting for DB condition: SELECT cb.role FROM channel_bindings cb JOIN node_channels nc ON nc.id = cb.node_channel_id JOIN nodes n ON n.id = nc.node_id WHERE n.zone_id = :zone_id AND n.uid = :node_uid AND n.status = 'online' AND cb.role IN ('main_pump', 'drain') ORDER BY cb.role
